LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT ORDER IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL MOTION FOR ORDER TO CHARGE PARTNERSHIP INTEREST IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAMA FRANCESCHIS INC. $25,361.27 PRINCIPAL, $8,104.02 INTEREST, $12,513.14 TAX PENALTIES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $45,978.43, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
